name: closet-x
description: Digital Closet Application - AI-powered wardrobe management

scripts.install-all: npm run install-services && npm run install-workers && npm run install-infrastructure
scripts.install-services: cd services/user-service && npm install && cd ../wardrobe-service && npm install && cd ../outfit-service && npm install && cd ../..
scripts.init-db: docker exec -i closetx-mongodb mongosh -u admin -p admin123 < infrastructure/scripts/mongo-init.js

author: Closet-X Team
